MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Defendant's motion to compel a response to special interrogatory #80 is granted. The objections are overruled. Plaintiff is ordered to serve a verified response within 15 days of notice of this order. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
